sample_lines.line: Intelligent, listen to the lyric medicine
The Mexicans are delegates who never have enough credit
It led to a local sickness, an encrypted mixture of bits
The entire stage was looking for the main player; he was fired
Atoms are inanimate, yet the person is an animal
Can you understand the votes, Egyptian scripture
Every sentence I’m inventin’ got a resonance
They led the men to the exit of the setting, through the entrance
The purpose of the commercials is to pass the inertial distance
I witnessed the system being built: the quickness of lyrics
The notes and cadence are real: they steal the goat's patience
Hence, I have to build a sentence with plenty of heavenly essence
It's a layered cake of your favorite flavors, steadily paced penance
The sentiment of the jingle is present
He said that he spent his cash on definitions
On the surface of the earth, there are presidents, driven by purpose and action
The man known as Satan stays shaping persuasion
Turning faith into trades—now belief is inflation
